title: Authorize a classification apply run
description: Require a current read-only preview and explicit owner authority before any selected suggestion or exact-rule match may mutate LEDGER. Implements G3 and UC-CLASSIFY-003.
rationale: Evaluation value must not become implicit mutation authority for an agent, rule, import, or background process.
story_want: review the exact current scope before applying classification decisions
story_so_that: only intended transactions and categories can be submitted to LEDGER
acceptance_criteria: Given any suggestion, when evaluation completes without an explicit apply invocation, then no LEDGER mutation occurs.

Given selected current suggestions, when apply preview is requested, then the preview identifies the evaluation and fingerprint, target category, rule versions, selected transaction identities, selection count, exclusions, no-suggestion count, and conflict count.
Given selected current suggestions, when apply preview is requested, then the preview operation performs no LEDGER mutation.
Given an exact rule without explicit owner-approved broad-apply authority, when rule-wide apply is requested, then CLASSIFY rejects the request before LEDGER mutation.

Given an exact rule with explicit owner-approved broad-apply authority, when the owner explicitly requests apply for its current preview, then only current unambiguous suggestions produced by that exact rule are authorized.
Given a no-suggestion, conflict, or stale outcome, when apply preview is built, then that outcome is excluded from the authorized selection.
Given any fingerprint change after preview, when apply is requested, then CLASSIFY rejects the preview as stale before LEDGER mutation.
security_criteria: Preview exposes only the identified owner-requested transactions and never emits their financial payloads to diagnostics.
